1.name: Healing Salve
1.description: Combine herbs and venom to create a potent healing salve.

2.description: Fuse scrap metal and ironwood bark into a defensive patch.

3.description: Distill wisp essence with a focus crystal for mental clarity.

4.description: Weave spider silk into a superior bandage.

6.description: Pack a thunder core into a throwable explosive.

7.description: Forge dragon scales into a powerful shield.

11.description: Integrate an AI core with data fragments for enhanced processing.

12.name: Golem Heart
12.description: Combine a golem core with sentinel core for immense power.
